problem.title: KISS-ICP throughput and accuracy trade-off on the MCD NTU day-02 sequence
problem.question: Which KISS-ICP profile should stay as the current default on the MCD public dataset (NTU day-02)?

variants.label: Balanced local map
variants.intent: Keep the current repository default as the odometry baseline.

variants.label: Fast recent map
variants.intent: Reduce source density and map pressure to improve FPS.

variants.label: Dense local map
variants.intent: Increase source density and local-map richness to fight odometry drift.
